title: Lead Revenue Manager at Menzies Aviation India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Menzies Aviation India
jsonLd.description:
We at Menzies Aviation India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Menzies Aviation India:
Menzies Aviation India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
